sizes = [2, 4, 6, 8, 10]
for size in sizes:
    # eigvals only
    dts = []
    for i in range(N):
        A = np.random.normal(size=(size, size)).astype(np.float64)
        t0 = time.perf_counter()
        vals = np.linalg.eigvals(A)
        t1 = time.perf_counter()
        dts.append(t1 - t0)
    dt1 = np.median(dts)

    # full eig
    dts = []

        A = np.random.normal(size=(size, size)).astype(np.float64)
        t0 = time.perf_counter()
        vals, vecs = np.linalg.eig(A)
        t1 = time.perf_counter()
        dts.append(t1 - t0)
